notes: BigCommerce store. Supplier-specific adapter (adapters/practicon.ts) reads the var BCData product_attributes data layer (sku/mpn/upc/gtin/price); the only ld+json on the page is a BreadcrumbList. Catalog discovered via practicon-catalog-discovery.ts (/xmlsitemap.php product feed, ~4,200 products); not /sitemap.xml. Captures gtin/upc barcode slot (usually null). Verified live 2026-06-18: 8/8 sample rows extracted, 0 failures.
